title: ampelocissus cavicaulis
intro: Ampelocissus cavicaulis is a type of climbing plant belonging to the grape family (Vitaceae), native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ampelocissus cavicaulis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
